bill_title: Criminal Code Amendment (Inciting Violence or Hatred) Bill 2024
summary: Creates offences for public incitement of violence or hatred based on protected attributes including sexual orientation and gender identity.
Comprehensive federal ban on conversion practices targeting sexual orientation or gender identity.
Bans conversion practices by health practitioners in NSW.
Narrows religious exemptions in NSW Anti-Discrimination Act for educational institutions.
Further narrows religious exemptions in Victorian Equal Opportunity Act.

bill_title: Children and Health Legislation Amendment (Deferral of Treatment for Intersex Children) Bill 2024
summary: Prohibits unnecessary medical interventions on intersex children that can be safely deferred until the child can provide informed consent. Protects intersex children's bodily autonomy and right to participate in decisions about their own bodies.

bill_title: Births Deaths and Marriages Registration (Gender Identity) Amendment Bill 2024
summary: Simplifies gender recognition process in Queensland to align with other progressive jurisdictions.

bill_title: Equal Opportunity (Sexual Orientation and Gender Identity) Amendment Bill 2024
summary: Would introduce vilification protections for LGBTIQ+ South Australians. Lapsed without vote.
Would ban conversion practices in Western Australia.

sponsor: Senate Legal and Constitutional Affairs Committee
summary: Senate inquiry into the practice of conversion practices in Australia. Public hearings ongoing.

bill_title: Parliamentary Inquiry into Religious Educational Institutions and Anti-Discrimination Laws
summary: Australian Law Reform Commission review of religious educational institutions and anti-discrimination laws.

bill_title: Health Legislation Amendment (Puberty Blockers Prohibition) Bill 2025
summary: Prohibits the prescription and administration of puberty blockers to transgender youth under 18
hansard_url: restricting access to gender-affirming healthcare for transgender adolescents.

summary: Omnibus reform strengthening vilification protections for multiple protected groups. LGBTIQ+ component specifically: expands definitions of hate speech targeting sexual orientation and gender identity
bill_url: and enhances penalties for repeat offenders targeting LGBTIQ+ individuals.

bill_title: Anti-Discrimination and Other Legislation Amendment Act 2024 (Qld)
summary: Major reforms to Anti-Discrimination Act 1991 (Qld) commenced 29 April 2024. Expanded definitions, enhanced protections for gender identity (including non-binary), added sex characteristics protection. Key reforms to vilification and discrimination provisions.

Narrowed religious exemptions in Victorian Equal Opportunity Act. Religious schools can only discriminate based on religious belief, not sexual orientation or gender identity. Students and teachers are protected.

Major reforms to Anti-Discrimination Act 1992 (NT) commenced 3 July 2023. Added sex characteristics protection, enhanced gender identity protections including non-binary recognition, added vilification protections (s.20A added late 2022).
Amendments passed October 2025 re-introduced some religious exemptions. Altered vilification prohibition provisions. Requires monitoring - represents step back from 2022/2023 reforms.
